极值
发表于 2020-04-27| 更新于 2020-05-04|数学分析
阅读量:|评论数:

无条件极值

设f(x)f(x)f(x)为定义开区域D⊂RnD\subset \mathbb{R}^nD⊂Rn上的一个nnn元函数，x:=(x1,x2,⋯ ,xn)∈Rnx:=(x_1,x_2,\cdots, x_n)\in \mathbb{R}^nx:=(x1​,x2​,⋯,xn​)∈Rn.

定理 1.1 (必要条件) 设f(x)f(x)f(x)在x0x^0x0处偏导存在，且在该点处取得极值，则x0x^0x0为f(x)f(x)f(x)的驻点，即

∇f(x0)=0⃗.\nabla f(x^0)=\vec{0}. ∇f(x0)=0.

若x0x^0x0为f(x)f(x)f(x)的驻点, 则f(x)f(x)f(x)在x0x^0x0处的二阶Taylor展开

f(x)=f(x0)+12(x−x0)⋅∇2f(x0)⋅(x−x0)T+o(∣x−x0∣2).f(x)=f(x^0)+ \frac 1 2 (x-x^0)\cdot\nabla^2f(x^0)\cdot(x-x^0)^{T}+o(|x-x^0|^2). f(x)=f(x0)+21​(x−x0)⋅∇2f(x0)⋅(x−x0)T+o(∣x−x0∣2).

定理 1.2 (充分条件) 若x0x^0x0为f(x)f(x)f(x)的驻点，∇2f(x0)\nabla^2f(x^0)∇2f(x0)存在，记λ1≤λ2≤⋯≤λn\lambda_1\le \lambda_2\le \cdots \le \lambda_nλ1​≤λ2​≤⋯≤λn​为矩阵∇2f(x0)\nabla^2f(x^0)∇2f(x0)的nnn个特征值，则有

  1. 当λ1λn>0\lambda_1\lambda_n>0λ1​λn​>0时, f(x)f(x)f(x)在x0x^0x0处取极值. 并且当λ1>0\lambda_1>0λ1​>0时取极小值；当λn<0\lambda_n<0λn​<0时取极大值；
  2. 当λ1λn<0\lambda_1\lambda_n<0λ1​λn​<0时, f(x)f(x)f(x)在x0x^0x0处不取极值；
  3. 当λ1λn=0\lambda_1\lambda_n=0λ1​λn​=0时, 无法直接由二阶导数判断x0x^0x0是否为极值。(如λ1=0\lambda_1=0λ1​=0,则应看函数在对应的特征方向V1⃗\vec{V_1}V1​​上是否为极值，此时是一元函数，用高阶导数判断即可)。

例 1.3 求函数f(x,y)=x4+y4−x2−2xy−y2f(x,y)=x^4+y^4-x^2-2xy-y^2f(x,y)=x4+y4−x2−2xy−y2的驻点，并判断其是否为极值点。

证明:

fx=4x3−2x−2y,fy=4y3−2x−2yf_x = 4x^3 - 2x - 2y, f_y = 4y^3 - 2x - 2y fx​=4x3−2x−2y,fy​=4y3−2x−2y

由∇f=0\nabla f = \mathbf{0}∇f=0 可知驻点为 (0,0),(1,1),(−1,−1)(0, 0), (1, 1), (-1, -1)(0,0),(1,1),(−1,−1), 又有

fxx=12x2−2,fxy=−2,fyy=12y2−2f_{xx} = 12x^2 - 2 , f_{xy} = -2 , f_{yy} = 12y^2 - 2 fxx​=12x2−2,fxy​=−2,fyy​=12y2−2

对于(1,1)(1, 1)(1,1) 和 (−1,−1)(-1, -1)(−1,−1)

∇2f=(10−2−210)\nabla ^2 f = \begin{pmatrix} 10 & -2\\ -2 & 10 \end{pmatrix} ∇2f=(10−2​−210​)

是正定矩阵,所以 (1,1)(1, 1)(1,1) 和 (−1,−1)(-1, -1)(−1,−1) 为极小值点

对于(0,0)(0,0)(0,0)

∇2f=(−2−2−2−2)\nabla ^2 f = \begin{pmatrix} -2 & -2\\ -2 & -2 \end{pmatrix} ∇2f=(−2−2​−2−2​)

无法直接判断,所以可以判断0特征值对应的特征方向是否为极值.

λ=0\lambda = 0λ=0 时, 特征方向为 (1,−1)(1,-1)(1,−1),即 y=−xy = -xy=−x,此时 f=2x4f = 2x^4f=2x4, (0,0)(0,0)(0,0) 在该方向为极小值.

λ=−4\lambda = -4λ=−4 时, 特征方向上为极大值.从而 (0,0)(0,0)(0,0) 不是极值点.

注 1.4 最值的求法

  1. 求出所求区域内部的可能的极值点(驻点及导数不存在的点)；
  2. 求出函数在区域边界上可能的极值点(条件极值). 如果是无界区域，则应考虑函数在无穷边界上函数值的性质(如比较在无穷的边界上的函数值与内部函数值大小)；
  3. 比较 1 和 2 中所求点的函数值大小。

注 1.5 多元函数最值也可转化成对各个变量累次求最值，如：

max⁡(x,y)f(x,y)=max⁡xmax⁡yf(x,y)=max⁡ymax⁡xf(x,y)\max_{(x,y)} f(x,y)=\max_{x}\max_{y}f(x,y)=\max_{y}\max_{x}f(x,y) (x,y)max​f(x,y)=xmax​ymax​f(x,y)=ymax​xmax​f(x,y)

例 1.6 当x≥1x\ge 1x≥1, y≥0y\ge 0y≥0时，证明：

xy≤xln⁡x−x+ey.xy\le x\ln x-x+e^y. xy≤xlnx−x+ey.

证明: 记D={(x,y):x≥1,y≥1}D = \{(x, y): x \ge 1, y \ge 1 \}D={(x,y):x≥1,y≥1}, f(x,y)=xln⁡x−x+ey−xyf(x,y) = x \ln x - x + e^y - xyf(x,y)=xlnx−x+ey−xy, 则

fx=ln⁡x−yfy=ey−xf_x = \ln x - y \quad \quad f_y = e^y - x fx​=lnx−yfy​=ey−x

所以 f(x,y)f(x,y)f(x,y) 的驻点为曲线 y=ln⁡x(x≥1)y = \ln x \quad (x \ge 1 )y=lnx(x≥1) 上的所有点, 此时

f(x,ln⁡x)=xln⁡x−x+x−xln⁡x=0f(x, \ln x) = x \ln x - x + x - x \ln x = 0 f(x,lnx)=xlnx−x+x−xlnx=0

对于 x=1x = 1x=1 上的点, 有 f(1,y)=ey−y−1≥0(y≥0)f(1, y) = e ^ y - y - 1 \ge 0 \quad (y \ge 0)f(1,y)=ey−y−1≥0(y≥0)

对于 y=1y = 1y=1 上的点, 有 f(x,0)=xln⁡x−x+1≥0(x≥1)f(x, 0) = x \ln x - x + 1 \ge 0 \quad (x \ge 1)f(x,0)=xlnx−x+1≥0(x≥1).

当 x→+∞x \rightarrow + \inftyx→+∞ 或 y→+∞y \rightarrow + \inftyy→+∞ 时, f(x,y)→+∞f(x,y) \rightarrow + \inftyf(x,y)→+∞.

综上, min⁡f(x,y)=0\min f(x,y) = 0minf(x,y)=0 , 即 xy≤xln⁡x−x+ey.xy\le x\ln x-x+e^y.xy≤xlnx−x+ey.

例 1.7 求由方程2x2+y2+z2+2xy−2x−2y−4z+4=02x^2+y^2+z^2+2xy-2x-2y-4z+4=02x2+y2+z2+2xy−2x−2y−4z+4=0所确定的函数z=z(x,y)z=z(x,y)z=z(x,y)的极值

证明: 首先求驻点:

{4x+2zzx+2y−2−4zx=02y+2zzy+2x−2−4zy=0\begin{cases} 4x + 2zz_x + 2y - 2 - 4z_x = 0\\ 2y + 2zz_y + 2x - 2 - 4z_y = 0 \end{cases} {4x+2zzx​+2y−2−4zx​=02y+2zzy​+2x−2−4zy​=0​

由 zx=zy=0z_x = z_y = 0zx​=zy​=0 可知驻点为 (0,1)(0, 1)(0,1). 又因为

∇2z(0,1)=(2111)\nabla ^ 2 z(0, 1) = \begin{pmatrix} 2 & 1\\ 1 & 1 \end{pmatrix} ∇2z(0,1)=(21​11​)

为正定矩阵, 所以 (0,1)(0, 1)(0,1) 为极小值点. 此时 z=1z = 1z=1.

条件极值

目标函数：

f(x1,x2,⋯ ,xn)f(x_1, x_2, \cdots, x_n) f(x1​,x2​,⋯,xn​)

约束条件:

φi(x1,x2,⋯ ,xn)=0\varphi_i(x_1,x_2,\cdots,x_n)=0 φi​(x1​,x2​,⋯,xn​)=0

其中1≤i≤m1\le i \le m1≤i≤m (m<nm<nm<n).

注 2.1 Lagrange 乘子法

  1. 根据目标函数以及约束条件构造Lagrange函数(n+mn+mn+m元)：

    L(x1,⋯ ,xn,λ1,⋯ ,λm):=f(x1,⋯ ,xn)+∑i=1mλiφi(x1,⋯ ,xn)L(x_1,\cdots, x_n,\lambda_1,\cdots,\lambda_m):=f(x_1,\cdots, x_n)+\sum_{i=1}^m \lambda_i \varphi_i(x_1,\cdots,x_n) L(x1​,⋯,xn​,λ1​,⋯,λm​):=f(x1​,⋯,xn​)+i=1∑m​λi​φi​(x1​,⋯,xn​)

  2. 求Lagrange函数的驻点，即原问题可能的极值点；

  3. 利用定理 1.2中的充分条件判断第2步中的驻点是否是极值点(方法：需要将mmm个约束条件看成隐函数组，从而得到 xi=xi(xm+1,⋯ ,xn)x_i=x_i(x_{m+1},\cdots,x_n)xi​=xi​(xm+1​,⋯,xn​) , 1≤i≤m1\le i\le m1≤i≤m, 带入目标函数后, 得到 n−mn-mn−m 元的无条件极值，再根据定理1.2的充分条件判断是否是极值点)，或者比较2中所求点的函数值，求出目标函数的最值。

例 2.2 用Lagrange乘子法求解例 1.7.

证明: 目标函数: f(x,y,z)=zf(x, y, z) = zf(x,y,z)=z.

约束条件: 2x2+y2+z2+2xy−2x−2y−4z+4=02x^2+y^2+z^2+2xy-2x-2y-4z+4=02x2+y2+z2+2xy−2x−2y−4z+4=0.

构造 L(x,y,z,λ)=z+λ(2x2+y2+z2+2xy−2x−2y−4z+4)L(x, y, z, \lambda) = z + \lambda(2x^2 + y^2 + z^2 + 2xy - 2x - 2y - 4z + 4)L(x,y,z,λ)=z+λ(2x2+y2+z2+2xy−2x−2y−4z+4), 则:

Lx=λ(4x+2y−2)=0L_x = \lambda(4x + 2y - 2) = 0 Lx​=λ(4x+2y−2)=0

Ly=λ(2y+2x−2)=0L_y = \lambda (2y + 2x - 2) = 0 Ly​=λ(2y+2x−2)=0

Lz=1+λ(2z−4)=0L_z = 1 + \lambda (2z - 4) = 0 Lz​=1+λ(2z−4)=0

求解可得:

{x=0y=1z=1λ=12\begin{cases} x = 0\\ y = 1\\ z = 1\\ \lambda = \frac{1}{2} \end{cases} ⎩⎪⎪⎪⎨⎪⎪⎪⎧​x=0y=1z=1λ=21​​

接下来步骤同例 1.7, 可知 (0,1,1)(0, 1, 1)(0,1,1) 处取得极小值, 此时 z=1z = 1z=1.

例 2.3 求函数z=x2+2xy+2y2z=x^2+\sqrt{2}xy+2y^2z=x2+2​xy+2y2在D:x2+2y2≤4D:x^2+2y^2\le 4D:x2+2y2≤4上的最大值与最小值。

证明: 先求内部驻点:

{zx=2x+2y=0zy=2x+2y=0\begin{cases} z_x = 2x + \sqrt{2} y = 0\\ z_y = \sqrt{2} x + 2y = 0 \end{cases} {zx​=2x+2​y=0zy​=2​x+2y=0​

可知, 驻点为 (0,0)(0, 0)(0,0), 且 z(0,0)=0z(0, 0) = 0z(0,0)=0.

而对于边界上的点 x2+4y2=4x^2 + 4y^2 = 4x2+4y2=4, 令 L(x,y,z,λ)=x2+2xy+2y2+λ(x2+2y2−4)L(x,y,z,\lambda) = x^2+\sqrt{2}xy+2y^2 + \lambda (x^2 + 2y^2 - 4)L(x,y,z,λ)=x2+2​xy+2y2+λ(x2+2y2−4), 则

{Lx=2x+2y+2λx=0Ly=2x+2y+4λy=0\begin{cases} L_x = 2x + \sqrt{2} y + 2 \lambda x = 0\\ L_y = \sqrt{2} x + 2y + 4 \lambda y = 0 \end{cases} {Lx​=2x+2​y+2λx=0Ly​=2​x+2y+4λy=0​

求解得: (x,y)=(±2,±1)(x, y) = (\pm \sqrt{2}, \pm 1)(x,y)=(±2​,±1), 计算值可知, max⁡z=z(2,1)=6\max z = z(\sqrt{2}, 1) = 6maxz=z(2​,1)=6 , min⁡z=z(0,0)=0\min z = z(0,0) = 0minz=z(0,0)=0.

例 2.4 求椭球面x23+y2+z22=1\frac{x^2}{3}+y^2+\frac{z^2}{2}=13x2​+y2+2z2​=1被过原点平面2x+y+z=02x+y+z=02x+y+z=0所截椭圆的面积。

证明: 椭圆的中心为 (0,0,0)(0, 0, 0)(0,0,0), 注意到 A=πabA = \pi a bA=πab. 令

Γ:{x23+y2+z22=12x+y+z=0\Gamma: \begin{cases} \frac{x^2}{3}+y^2+\frac{z^2}{2}=1\\ 2x+y+z=0 \end{cases} Γ:{3x2​+y2+2z2​=12x+y+z=0​

则 a=max⁡ρ∈Γd(ρ,0)a = \max_{\rho \in \Gamma} d(\rho, 0)a=maxρ∈Γ​d(ρ,0), a=min⁡ρ∈Γd(ρ,0)a = \min_{\rho \in \Gamma} d(\rho, 0)a=minρ∈Γ​d(ρ,0).

即目标函数为 d2=x2+y2+z2d^2 = x^2 + y^2 + z^2d2=x2+y2+z2, 构造

L(x,y,z,λ,μ)=x2+y2+z2+λ(x23+y2+z22−1)+μ(2x+y+z)L(x,y,z,\lambda , \mu) = x^2 + y^2 + z^2 + \lambda(\frac{x^2}{3}+y^2+\frac{z^2}{2}-1)+\mu(2x+y+z)L(x,y,z,λ,μ)=x2+y2+z2+λ(3x2​+y2+2z2​−1)+μ(2x+y+z), 则有

Lx=2x+23λx+2μ=0L_x = 2x+\frac{2}{3}\lambda x + 2 \mu = 0 Lx​=2x+32​λx+2μ=0

Ly=2y+2λy+μ=0L_y = 2y + 2\lambda y + \mu = 0 Ly​=2y+2λy+μ=0

Lz=2z+λz+μ=0L_z = 2z + \lambda z + \mu = 0 Lz​=2z+λz+μ=0

于是可以的求得2x2+2y2+2z2+2λ=02x^2 + 2y^2 + 2z^2 + 2 \lambda = 02x2+2y2+2z2+2λ=0 , 即λ=−d2\lambda = -d^2λ=−d2,于是有

{(1+λ3)x=(2+2λ)y=(2+λ)z=t2x+y+z=0x23+y2+z22=1\begin{cases} (1+\frac{\lambda}{3})x = (2 + 2 \lambda) y = (2 + \lambda) z = t\\ 2x + y + z = 0\\ \frac{x^2}{3}+y^2+\frac{z^2}{2}=1 \end{cases} ⎩⎪⎨⎪⎧​(1+3λ​)x=(2+2λ)y=(2+λ)z=t2x+y+z=03x2​+y2+2z2​=1​

从而有

21+λ3+12+2λ+12+λ=0\frac{2}{1+\frac{\lambda}{3}}+\frac{1}{2+2\lambda}+\frac{1}{2+\lambda} = 0 1+3λ​2​+2+2λ1​+2+λ1​=0

于是 15λ2+49λ+36=015\lambda^2 + 49\lambda + 36 = 015λ2+49λ+36=0 ,可知 λ1λ2=125\lambda_1\lambda_2 = \frac{12}{5}λ1​λ2​=512​ ,由于必定存在 dmind_{min}dmin​ 与 dmaxd_{max}dmax​ , 且只求出两个驻点对应的 d1,d2d_1,d_2d1​,d2​, 故必为原问题的解,从而有

dmax2dmin2=λ1λ2=125d^2_{max}d^2_{min} = \lambda_1\lambda_2 = \frac{12}{5} dmax2​dmin2​=λ1​λ2​=512​

于是 A=πab=π125A = \pi ab = \pi \sqrt{\frac{12}{5}}A=πab=π512​​.

无条件极值

例 3.1 在∑i=1nxi=1\sum\limits_{i=1}^n x_i=1i=1∑n​xi​=1, xi>0x_i>0xi​>0 (1≤i≤n1\le i \le n1≤i≤n)条件下求函数u=∏i=1nxiαiu=\prod\limits_{i=1}^n x_i^{\alpha_i}u=i=1∏n​xiαi​​的最大值。其中αi\alpha_iαi​为正常数。

证明： 令 D={(x1,⋯ ,xn):∑i=1nxi=1,xi>0}D = \{(x_1,\cdots , x_n) : \sum_{i=1}^n x_i = 1 , x_i > 0\}D={(x1​,⋯,xn​):∑i=1n​xi​=1,xi​>0}, 显然有 u∣∂D=0u|_{\partial D} = 0u∣∂D​=0 , 于是 uuu 在 DDD 的内部取得最大值,

L(x1,x2,⋯ ,xn,λ)=∏i=1nxiαi+λ(∑i=1nxi−1)L(x_1, x_2, \cdots, x_n, \lambda) = \prod_{i = 1}^n x_i^{\alpha_i}+\lambda(\sum_{i=1}^nx_i - 1) L(x1​,x2​,⋯,xn​,λ)=i=1∏n​xiαi​​+λ(i=1∑n​xi​−1)

由 Lxi=0L_{x_i}=0Lxi​​=0 可知,

αixiαi−1∏j≠inxjαj+λ=0\alpha_ix_i^{\alpha_i-1}\prod_{j\ne i}^n x_j^{\alpha_j}+\lambda = 0 αi​xiαi​−1​j​=i∏n​xjαj​​+λ=0

再由

∑i=1nxi=1\sum\limits_{i=1}^n x_i=1 i=1∑n​xi​=1

可知

xi=αi∑j=1nαjx_i = \frac{\alpha_i}{\sum_{j=1}^n\alpha_j} xi​=∑j=1n​αj​αi​​

为唯一驻点,在该点取到最大值,此时

M=∏i=1n(αi∑j=1nαj)αiM = \prod_{i=1}^n\Big( \frac{\alpha_i}{\sum_{j=1}^n\alpha_j}\Big)^{\alpha_i} M=i=1∏n​(∑j=1n​αj​αi​​)αi​

例 3.2 设函数F(x,y)F(x,y)F(x,y)在R2\mathbb{R}^2R2上有连续的偏导数，F(x,y)=0F(x,y)=0F(x,y)=0是不自相交的封闭曲线Γ\GammaΓ.设Fx2+Fy2≠0F_x^2+F^2_y\neq 0Fx2​+Fy2​​=0在Γ\GammaΓ上处处不成立.证明：若ABABAB是Γ\GammaΓ的极大弦，则Γ\GammaΓ在A,BA,BA,B处的两条切线平行。

证明: 设 A=(x1,y1)A = (x_1, y_1)A=(x1​,y1​), B=(x2,y2)B = (x_2, y_2)B=(x2​,y2​), 则有F(x1,y1)=F(x2,y2)=0F(x_1, y_1)=F(x_2, y_2)=0F(x1​,y1​)=F(x2​,y2​)=0.记 ddd 为弦 ABABAB 的长度, k1k_1k1​, k2k_2k2​ 分别为 SSS 在 AAA, BBB 处切线的斜率,则有

d=(x1−x2)2+(y1−y2)2d = (x_1 - x_2)^2 + (y_1 - y_2)^2 d=(x1​−x2​)2+(y1​−y2​)2

k1=−FxFy∣(x1,y1)k_1 = -\frac{F_x}{F_y}|_{(x_1,y_1)} k1​=−Fy​Fx​​∣(x1​,y1​)​

k2=−FxFy∣(x2,y2)k_2 = -\frac{F_x}{F_y}|_{(x_2,y_2)} k2​=−Fy​Fx​​∣(x2​,y2​)​

若 ABABAB 为最大弦,则 (x1,y1,x2,y2)(x_1, y_1, x_2, y_2)(x1​,y1​,x2​,y2​) 满足 ∇L=0\nabla L = \mathbf{0}∇L=0,其中

L≜(x1−x2)2+(y1−y2)2+λF(x1,y1)+μF(x2,y2)L \triangleq (x_1 - x_2)^2 + (y_1 - y_2)^2 + \lambda F(x_1, y_1) + \mu F(x_2, y_2) L≜(x1​−x2​)2+(y1​−y2​)2+λF(x1​,y1​)+μF(x2​,y2​)

于是

Lx1=2(x1−x2)+λFx(x1,y1,z1)=0L_{x_1} = 2(x_1 - x_2) + \lambda F_x(x_1,y_1,z_1) = 0 Lx1​​=2(x1​−x2​)+λFx​(x1​,y1​,z1​)=0

Ly1=2(y1−y2)+λFy(x1,y1,z1)=0L_{y_1} = 2(y_1 - y_2) + \lambda F_y(x_1,y_1,z_1) = 0 Ly1​​=2(y1​−y2​)+λFy​(x1​,y1​,z1​)=0

Lx2=2(x2−x1)+μFx(x2,y2)=0L_{x_2} = 2(x_2 - x_1) + \mu F_x(x_2,y_2) = 0 Lx2​​=2(x2​−x1​)+μFx​(x2​,y2​)=0

Ly2=2(y2−y1)+μFy(x2,y2)=0L_{y_2} = 2(y_2 - y_1) + \mu F_y(x_2,y_2) = 0 Ly2​​=2(y2​−y1​)+μFy​(x2​,y2​)=0

则有

k1=−x1−x2y1−y2=k2k_1 = -\frac{x_1-x_2}{y_1-y_2} = k_2 k1​=−y1​−y2​x1​−x2​​=k2​

即切线平行.

例 3.3 证明对于任何正数a,b,ca,b,ca,b,c都有

ab2c3≤108(a+b+c6)6.ab^2c^3\le 108 \Big(\frac{a+b+c}{6}\Big)^6. ab2c3≤108(6a+b+c​)6.

证明: 由均值不等式

108(a+b+c6)6=108(a+b/2+b/2+c/3+c/3+c/36)6≥108(6ab2c3/10866)6=ab2c3\begin{aligned} 108 \Big(\frac{a+b+c}{6}\Big)^6 &= 108 \Big(\frac{a+b/2+b/2+c/3+c/3+c/3}{6}\Big)^6\\ & \ge 108\Big(\frac{6\sqrt[6]{ab^2c^3/108}}{6}\Big)^6\\ & = ab^2c^3 \end{aligned} 108(6a+b+c​)6​=108(6a+b/2+b/2+c/3+c/3+c/3​)6≥108(666ab2c3/108​​)6=ab2c3​

例 3.4 设A:=(aij)A:=(a_{ij})A:=(aij​)为nnn阶可逆方阵. 证明：

(det⁡A)2≤∏i=1n(∑j=1naij2),(\operatorname{det}A)^2\le \prod_{i=1}^n(\sum_{j=1}^n a_{ij}^2), (detA)2≤i=1∏n​(j=1∑n​aij2​),

并且等号成立当且仅当AATAA^{T}AAT为对角阵。

证明: 记 ∑j=1naij2=mi>0,i=1,2,⋯ ,n\sum_{j = 1}^n a_{ij}^2 = m_i>0,i = 1, 2, \cdots, n∑j=1n​aij2​=mi​>0,i=1,2,⋯,n.
只需证∣A∣2≤∏i=1nmi|A|^2\le \prod_{i=1}^nm_i∣A∣2≤∏i=1n​mi​,于是原问题转化为求 f(aij)=∣A∣2f(a_{ij})=|A|^2f(aij​)=∣A∣2 在 ∑j=1naij2=mi\sum_{j = 1}^n a_{ij}^2 = m_i∑j=1n​aij2​=mi​ 下的最大值,此时

L(aij,λk)=∣A∣2+∑k=1nλk(∑j=1nakj2−mk)2L(a_{ij,\lambda_k})=|A|^2+\sum_{k=1}^n\lambda_k\Big(\sum_{j=1}^na_{kj}^2-m_k\Big)^2 L(aij,λk​​)=∣A∣2+k=1∑n​λk​(j=1∑n​akj2​−mk​)2

注意到

∂∂aij∣A∣=∂∂aij(∑k=1naikAik)\frac{\partial}{\partial a_{ij}}|A| = \frac{\partial}{\partial a_{ij}}\Big(\sum_{k=1}^na_{ik}A_{ik} \Big) ∂aij​∂​∣A∣=∂aij​∂​(k=1∑n​aik​Aik​)

由

∂L∂aij=2∣A∣Aij+2λiaij=0\frac{\partial L}{\partial a_{ij}} =2|A|A_{ij}+2\lambda_ia_{ij}= 0 ∂aij​∂L​=2∣A∣Aij​+2λi​aij​=0

可知

∣A∣(A∗)T+(λ1⋱λn)A=0|A|(A^*)^T+ \begin{pmatrix} \lambda_1 & & \\ & \ddots & \\ & & \lambda_n \end{pmatrix}A = 0 ∣A∣(A∗)T+⎝⎛​λ1​​⋱​λn​​⎠⎞​A=0

若在 A0A_0A0​ 处取到最大值,则

∣A∣(A∗)T+(λ1⋱λn)A0=0|A|(A^*)^T+ \begin{pmatrix} \lambda_1 & & \\ & \ddots & \\ & & \lambda_n \end{pmatrix}A_0 = 0 ∣A∣(A∗)T+⎝⎛​λ1​​⋱​λn​​⎠⎞​A0​=0

即

∣A0∣2E=−(λ1⋱λn)A0A0T|A_0|^2E = -\begin{pmatrix} \lambda_1 & & \\ & \ddots & \\ & & \lambda_n \end{pmatrix}A_0A_0^T ∣A0​∣2E=−⎝⎛​λ1​​⋱​λn​​⎠⎞​A0​A0T​

从而 A0A0TA_0A_0^TA0​A0T​ 为对角阵,且 f(A0)=∣A0∣2=∣A0A0T∣=∏i=1nmif(A_0) = |A_0|^2 = |A_0A_0^T|=\prod_{i=1}^nm_if(A0​)=∣A0​∣2=∣A0​A0T​∣=∏i=1n​mi​
从而

(det⁡A)2≤∏i=1n(∑j=1naij2)(\operatorname{det}A)^2\le \prod_{i=1}^n(\sum_{j=1}^n a_{ij}^2) (detA)2≤i=1∏n​(j=1∑n​aij2​)

作业

作业1 求函数z=x2−xy+y2z=x^2-xy+y^2z=x2−xy+y2在D:∣x∣+∣y∣≤1D:|x|+|y|\le1D:∣x∣+∣y∣≤1上的最值。

证明: 先求内部驻点:

{zx=2x−y=0zy=−x+2y=0\begin{cases} z_x = 2x -y = 0\\ z_y = -x + 2y = 0 \end{cases} {zx​=2x−y=0zy​=−x+2y=0​

求得驻点为 (0,0)(0, 0)(0,0), 此时 z(0,0)=0z(0, 0) = 0z(0,0)=0.

当 (x,y)(x,y)(x,y) 位于 ∂D\partial D∂D 上时, ∣x∣+∣y∣=1|x| + |y| = 1∣x∣+∣y∣=1 , 此时

z=x2−xy+y2=(∣x∣+∣y∣)2−2∣xy∣−xy=1−2∣xy∣−xy\begin{aligned} z &= x^2-xy+y^2\\ &= (|x|+|y|)^2 - 2|xy| -xy\\ &= 1 - 2|xy| -xy \end{aligned} z​=x2−xy+y2=(∣x∣+∣y∣)2−2∣xy∣−xy=1−2∣xy∣−xy​

  1. 当 xy≥0xy \ge 0xy≥0 时, z=1−3xyz = 1 - 3xyz=1−3xy , 且 0≤xy≤140 \le xy \le \frac{1}{4}0≤xy≤41​ ,于是 14≤z≤1\frac{1}{4} \le z \le 141​≤z≤1
  2. 当 xy<0xy<0xy<0 时, z=1+xyz = 1 + xyz=1+xy , 且 −14≤xy<0-\frac{1}{4} \le xy < 0−41​≤xy<0, 于是 34≤z<1\frac{3}{4} \le z < 143​≤z<1

综上, max⁡z=1\max z = 1maxz=1, min⁡z=0\min z = 0minz=0 .

作业2 过椭圆3x2+2xy+3y2=13x^2+2xy+3y^2=13x2+2xy+3y2=1上任一点作此椭圆的切线，求切线与两坐标轴所围成三角形面积的最小值。

证明: 设 P(x0,y0)P(x_0,y_0)P(x0​,y0​) 为椭圆上任一点, 则过该点的切线方程为 (3x0+y0)x+(x0+3y0)y=1(3x_0 + y_0)x + (x_0+3y_0)y = 1(3x0​+y0​)x+(x0​+3y0​)y=1 ,于是在 x,yx ,yx,y轴的交点分别为 (−13x0+y0,0)(-\frac{1}{3x_0+ y_0},0)(−3x0​+y0​1​,0) 和 (0,−1x0+3y0)(0,-\frac{1}{x_0+3y_0})(0,−x0​+3y0​1​),从而三角形面积为:

S=121∣3x02+10x0y0+3y02∣S = \frac{1}{2}\frac{1}{|3x_0^2+10x_0y_0+3y_0^2|} S=21​∣3x02​+10x0​y0​+3y02​∣1​

注意到1=3x02+2x0y0+3y02≥8∣x0y0∣1 = 3x_0^2+2x_0y_0+3y_0^2 \ge 8|x_0y_0|1=3x02​+2x0​y0​+3y02​≥8∣x0​y0​∣,即∣x0y0∣≤18|x_0y_0|\le \frac{1}{8}∣x0​y0​∣≤81​.而

∣3x02+10x0y0+3y02∣=∣1+8x0y0∣≤2\begin{aligned} |3x_0^2+10x_0y_0+3y_0^2|=|1+8x_0y_0|\le2 \end{aligned} ∣3x02​+10x0​y0​+3y02​∣=∣1+8x0​y0​∣≤2​

于是有

S=121∣3x02+10x0y0+3y02∣≥14S = \frac{1}{2}\frac{1}{|3x_0^2+10x_0y_0+3y_0^2|} \ge \frac{1}{4} S=21​∣3x02​+10x0​y0​+3y02​∣1​≥41​

当且仅当 (x,y)=(18,18)(x,y)=(\sqrt{\frac{1}{8}},\sqrt{\frac{1}{8}})(x,y)=(81​​,81​​) 或 (x,y)=(−18,−18)(x,y)=(\sqrt{-\frac{1}{8}},-\sqrt{\frac{1}{8}})(x,y)=(−81​​,−81​​)时等号成立,于是面积的最小值为14\frac{1}{4}41​.

作业3 求曲面4x2+4y2−z2=14x^2+4y^2-z^2=14x2+4y2−z2=1与平面x+y−z=0x+y-z=0x+y−z=0的交线在xOyxOyxOy面上的投影所围区域的面积。

证明: 消去 zzz 可知3x2+3y2−2xy=13x^2+3y^2-2xy=13x2+3y2−2xy=1 , 为交线在xOyxOyxOy面上投影的方程,为一椭圆,故只需求长短半轴的长度, 记为a,ba,ba,b, 令

d2=x2+y2(d>0)d^2 = x^2 + y ^ 2 (\quad d>0) d2=x2+y2(d>0)

则 a,ba , ba,b 分别为 ddd 的最大,最小值,注意到

−x2−y2≤2xy≤x2+y2-x^2-y^2 \le 2xy \le x^2 + y^2 −x2−y2≤2xy≤x2+y2

于是有

4x2+4y2≤1=3x2+2y2−2xy≤2x2+2y24x^2+4y^2 \le 1=3x^2+2y^2-2xy \le 2x^2+2y^2 4x2+4y2≤1=3x2+2y2−2xy≤2x2+2y2

即14≤d2≤12\frac{1}{4}\le d^2\le \frac{1}{2}41​≤d2≤21​,当(x,y)=(12,12)(x,y)=(\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2})(x,y)=(21​,21​) 或 (x,y)=(−12,−12)(x,y) = (-\frac{1}{2},-\frac{1}{2})(x,y)=(−21​,−21​) 时取最大值12\frac{1}{2}21​,当 (x,y)=(18,18)(x,y)=(\sqrt{\frac{1}{8}},\sqrt{\frac{1}{8}})(x,y)=(81​​,81​​) 或 (x,y)=(−18,−18)(x,y)=(\sqrt{-\frac{1}{8}},-\sqrt{\frac{1}{8}})(x,y)=(−81​​,−81​​)取最小值 14\frac{1}{4}41​.于是椭圆的面积为π8\frac{\pi}{8}8π​.

作业4 用条件极值的方法证明 H"older不等式：

∑k=1nakbk≤(∑k=1nakp)1p(∑k=1nbkq)1q\sum_{k=1}^na_kb_k\le\Big(\sum_{k=1}^na_k^p\Big)^{\frac 1 p} \Big(\sum_{k=1}^nb_k^q\Big)^{\frac 1 q} k=1∑n​ak​bk​≤(k=1∑n​akp​)p1​(k=1∑n​bkq​)q1​

其中ak,bk>0a_k,b_k>0ak​,bk​>0, p,q>1p,q>1p,q>1且1p+1q=1\frac 1 p+\frac 1 q=1p1​+q1​=1.

证明: 考察函数

f(b1,b2,⋯ ,bn)=(∑k=1nakp)1p(∑k=1nbkq)1qf(b_1, b_2, \cdots, b_n) = \Big(\sum_{k=1}^na_k^p\Big)^{\frac 1 p} \Big(\sum_{k=1}^nb_k^q\Big)^{\frac 1 q} f(b1​,b2​,⋯,bn​)=(k=1∑n​akp​)p1​(k=1∑n​bkq​)q1​

在约束条件

∑k=1nakbk=l\sum_{k=1}^na_kb_k = l k=1∑n​ak​bk​=l

下的极值, 作函数

F(b1,b2,⋯ ,bn)=(∑k=1nakp)1p(∑k=1nbkq)1q+λ(l−∑i=1naibi)F(b_1, b_2, \cdots, b_n) = \Big(\sum_{k=1}^na_k^p\Big)^{\frac 1 p} \Big(\sum_{k=1}^nb_k^q\Big)^{\frac 1 q} + \lambda (l - \sum_{i=1}^na_ib_i) F(b1​,b2​,⋯,bn​)=(k=1∑n​akp​)p1​(k=1∑n​bkq​)q1​+λ(l−i=1∑n​ai​bi​)

并可得方程组

Fbj′=bjq−1(∑k=1nakp)1p(∑k=1nbkq)1q−1−λaj=0(j=1,⋯ ,n)F'_{b_j} = b_j^{q-1}\Big(\sum_{k=1}^na_k^p\Big)^{\frac 1 p} \Big(\sum_{k=1}^nb_k^q\Big)^{\frac 1 q - 1}-\lambda a_j = 0 \quad (j = 1, \cdots, n) Fbj​′​=bjq−1​(k=1∑n​akp​)p1​(k=1∑n​bkq​)q1​−1−λaj​=0(j=1,⋯,n)

于是有

(bjbm)q−1=ajam\Big(\frac{b_j}{b_m} \Big)^{q-1} = \frac{a_j}{a_m} (bm​bj​​)q−1=am​aj​​

对于给定的 mmm , 有

bj=bm(ajam)1q−1b_j = b_m \Big(\frac{a_j}{a_m} \Big)^{\frac 1 {q-1}} bj​=bm​(am​aj​​)q−11​

带入约束条件, 可得

∑i=1naibm(aiam)1q−1=l\sum_{i=1}^na_ib_m \Big(\frac{a_i}{a_m} \Big)^{\frac 1 {q-1}} = l i=1∑n​ai​bm​(am​ai​​)q−11​=l

即

bm∑i=1naiqq−1am1q−1=lb_m \sum_{i = 1}^n \frac{a_i^{\frac{q}{q-1}}}{a_m^{\frac 1{q-1}}}=l bm​i=1∑n​amq−11​​aiq−1q​​​=l

利用 1p+1q=1\frac 1 p+\frac 1 q=1p1​+q1​=1 可得驻点

bm=lanpq∑i=1naip(m=1,2,⋯ ,n)b_m = l \frac{a_n^{\frac{p}{q}}}{\sum_{i=1}^na_i^p} \quad (m = 1, 2, \cdots, n) bm​=l∑i=1n​aip​anqp​​​(m=1,2,⋯,n)

此时 f=lf = lf=l.

下面考虑 FFF 的Jacobi矩阵的正定性, 由于

dF=(∑k=1nakp)1p(∑k=1nbkq)1q−1∑i=1nbiq−1dbi−λ∑i=1naidbi=(∑k=1nakp)1p(∑k=1nbkq)1q∑i=1nbiq−1dbi\mathbb{d} F = \Big(\sum_{k=1}^na_k^p\Big)^{\frac 1 p} \Big(\sum_{k=1}^nb_k^q\Big)^{\frac 1 q -1} \sum_{i = 1}^n b_i^{q-1}\mathbb{d}b_i- \lambda \sum_{i=1}^na_i\mathbb{d}b_i=\Big(\sum_{k=1}^na_k^p\Big)^{\frac 1 p} \Big(\sum_{k=1}^nb_k^q\Big)^{\frac 1 q} \sum_{i = 1}^n b_i^{q-1}\mathbb{d}b_i dF=(k=1∑n​akp​)p1​(k=1∑n​bkq​)q1​−1i=1∑n​biq−1​dbi​−λi=1∑n​ai​dbi​=(k=1∑n​akp​)p1​(k=1∑n​bkq​)q1​i=1∑n​biq−1​dbi​

d2F=(∑k=1nakp)1p[(q−1)(∑k=1nbkq)1q−1∑i=1nbiq−2dbi2+(1−q)(∑k=1nbkq)1q−2(∑i=1nbiq−1dbi)2]\mathbb{d}^2 F =\Big(\sum_{k=1}^na_k^p\Big)^{\frac 1 p} \Big[(q-1)\Big(\sum_{k=1}^nb_k^q\Big)^{\frac 1 q-1}\sum_{i=1}^nb_i^{q-2}\mathbb{d}b_i^2 + (1-q)\Big(\sum_{k=1}^nb_k^q\Big)^{\frac 1 q-2}\Big(\sum_{i = 1}^n b_i^{q-1}\mathbb{d}b_i\Big)^2\Big] d2F=(k=1∑n​akp​)p1​[(q−1)(k=1∑n​bkq​)q1​−1i=1∑n​biq−2​dbi2​+(1−q)(k=1∑n​bkq​)q1​−2(i=1∑n​biq−1​dbi​)2]

而注意到 dF=0\mathbb{d} F = 0dF=0, 即

∑i=1nbiq−1dbi=0\sum_{i = 1}^n b_i^{q-1}\mathbb{d}b_i = 0 i=1∑n​biq−1​dbi​=0

于是有 dF>0\mathbb{d} F >0dF>0, 即有

(db1,db2,⋯ ,dbn)J(F)(db1,db2,⋯ ,dbn)T>0(\mathbb{d}b_1,\mathbb{d}b_2,\cdots,\mathbb{d}b_n)J(F)(\mathbb{d}b_1,\mathbb{d}b_2,\cdots,\mathbb{d}b_n)^T>0 (db1​,db2​,⋯,dbn​)J(F)(db1​,db2​,⋯,dbn​)T>0

于是J(F)J(F)J(F) 为正定矩阵, 从而在驻点处取到最小值,于是有

∑k=1nakbk≤(∑k=1nakp)1p(∑k=1nbkq)1q\sum_{k=1}^na_kb_k\le\Big(\sum_{k=1}^na_k^p\Big)^{\frac 1 p} \Big(\sum_{k=1}^nb_k^q\Big)^{\frac 1 q} k=1∑n​ak​bk​≤(k=1∑n​akp​)p1​(k=1∑n​bkq​)q1​

作业5 设函数F(x,y,z)F(x,y,z)F(x,y,z)在R3\mathbb{R}^3R3上有一阶连续偏导数,SSS是由F(x,y,z)=0F(x,y,z)=0F(x,y,z)=0确定的不自交的光滑封闭曲面。设Fx2+Fy2+Fz2≠0F_x^2+F_y^2+F^2_z\neq 0Fx2​+Fy2​+Fz2​​=0在SSS上处处成立. 若A,BA,BA,B是SSS上使得SSS上任两点距离的最大值点。证明：SSS 在 A,BA,BA,B 处的两个切平面平行，且均垂直于AAA和BBB的连线。

证明: 设 A=(x1,y1,z1)A = (x_1, y_1, z_1)A=(x1​,y1​,z1​), B=(x2,y2,z2)B = (x_2, y_2, z_2)B=(x2​,y2​,z2​), 则有F(x1,y1,z1)=F(x2,y2,z2)=0F(x_1, y_1, z_1)=F(x_2, y_2, z_2)=0F(x1​,y1​,z1​)=F(x2​,y2​,z2​)=0.记 ddd 为弦 ABABAB 的长度, n1\mathbf{n}_1n1​, n2\mathbf{n}_2n2​ 分别为 SSS 在 AAA, BBB 处切平面的法向量,则有

d=(x1−x2)2+(y1−y2)2+(z1−z2)d = (x_1 - x_2)^2 + (y_1 - y_2)^2 + (z_1 - z_2) d=(x1​−x2​)2+(y1​−y2​)2+(z1​−z2​)

n1=(Fx,Fy,Fz)∣(x1,y1,z1)\mathbf{n}_1 = (F_x, F_y, F_z)|_{(x_1,y_1,z_1)} n1​=(Fx​,Fy​,Fz​)∣(x1​,y1​,z1​)​

n2=(Fx,Fy,Fz)∣(x2,y2,z2)\mathbf{n}_2 = (F_x, F_y, F_z)|_{(x_2,y_2,z_2)} n2​=(Fx​,Fy​,Fz​)∣(x2​,y2​,z2​)​

若 ABABAB 为最大弦,则 (x1,y1,z1,x2,y2,z2)(x_1, y_1, z_1, x_2, y_2, z_2)(x1​,y1​,z1​,x2​,y2​,z2​) 满足 ∇L=0\nabla L = \mathbf{0}∇L=0,其中

L≜(x1−x2)2+(y1−y2)2+(z1−z2)2+λF(x1,y1,z1)+μF(x2,y2,z2)L \triangleq (x_1 - x_2)^2 + (y_1 - y_2)^2 + (z_1 - z_2)^2 + \lambda F(x_1, y_1, z_1) + \mu F(x_2, y_2, z_2) L≜(x1​−x2​)2+(y1​−y2​)2+(z1​−z2​)2+λF(x1​,y1​,z1​)+μF(x2​,y2​,z2​)

于是

Lx1=2(x1−x2)+λFx(x1,y1,z1)=0(3-1)L_{x_1} = 2(x_1 - x_2) + \lambda F_x(x_1,y_1,z_1) = 0 \tag{3-1} Lx1​​=2(x1​−x2​)+λFx​(x1​,y1​,z1​)=0(3-1)

Ly1=2(y1−y2)+λFy(x1,y1,z1)=0(3-2)L_{y_1} = 2(y_1 - y_2) + \lambda F_y(x_1,y_1,z_1) = 0 \tag{3-2} Ly1​​=2(y1​−y2​)+λFy​(x1​,y1​,z1​)=0(3-2)

Lz1=2(z1−z2)+λFz(x1,y1,z1)=0(3-3)L_{z_1} = 2(z_1 - z_2) + \lambda F_z(x_1,y_1,z_1) = 0 \tag{3-3} Lz1​​=2(z1​−z2​)+λFz​(x1​,y1​,z1​)=0(3-3)

Lx2=2(x2−x1)+μFx(x2,y2,z2)=0(3-4)L_{x_2} = 2(x_2 - x_1) + \mu F_x(x_2,y_2,z_2) = 0 \tag{3-4} Lx2​​=2(x2​−x1​)+μFx​(x2​,y2​,z2​)=0(3-4)

Ly2=2(y2−y1)+μFy(x2,y2,z2)=0(3-5)L_{y_2} = 2(y_2 - y_1) + \mu F_y(x_2,y_2,z_2) = 0 \tag{3-5} Ly2​​=2(y2​−y1​)+μFy​(x2​,y2​,z2​)=0(3-5)

Lz2=2(z2−z1)+μFz(x2,y2,z2)=0(3-6)L_{z_2} = 2(z_2 - z_1) + \mu F_z(x_2,y_2,z_2) = 0 \tag{3-6} Lz2​​=2(z2​−z1​)+μFz​(x2​,y2​,z2​)=0(3-6)

则(3-1) + (3-4), (3-2) + (3-5), (3-3) + (3-6) 可得

λFx(x1,y1,z1)=μFx(x2,y2,z2)\lambda F_x(x_1,y_1,z_1) = \mu F_x(x_2,y_2,z_2) λFx​(x1​,y1​,z1​)=μFx​(x2​,y2​,z2​)

λFy(x1,y1,z1)=μFy(x2,y2,z2)\lambda F_y(x_1,y_1,z_1) = \mu F_y(x_2,y_2,z_2) λFy​(x1​,y1​,z1​)=μFy​(x2​,y2​,z2​)

λFz(x1,y1,z1)=μFz(x2,y2,z2)\lambda F_z(x_1,y_1,z_1) = \mu F_z(x_2,y_2,z_2) λFz​(x1​,y1​,z1​)=μFz​(x2​,y2​,z2​)

即

Fx(x1,y1,z1)Fx(x2,y2,z2)=Fx(x1,y1,z1)Fx(x2,y2,z2)=Fx(x1,y1,z1)Fx(x2,y2,z2)\frac{F_x(x_1,y_1,z_1)}{F_x(x_2,y_2,z_2)}=\frac{F_x(x_1,y_1,z_1)}{F_x(x_2,y_2,z_2)}=\frac{F_x(x_1,y_1,z_1)}{F_x(x_2,y_2,z_2)} Fx​(x2​,y2​,z2​)Fx​(x1​,y1​,z1​)​=Fx​(x2​,y2​,z2​)Fx​(x1​,y1​,z1​)​=Fx​(x2​,y2​,z2​)Fx​(x1​,y1​,z1​)​

条件 Fx2+Fy2+Fz2≠0F_x^2+F_y^2+F^2_z\neq 0Fx2​+Fy2​+Fz2​​=0 保证了上式有意义,于是法向量 n1\mathbf{n}_1n1​与n2\mathbf{n}_2n2​ 平行,从而SSS在A,BA,BA,B处的两个切平面平行.

又由(3-1), (3-2), (3-3)得

Fx(x1,y1,z1)x1−x2=Fy(x1,y1,z1)y1−y2=Fz(x1,y1,z1)z1−z2=−2λ\frac{F_x(x_1,y_1,z_1)}{x_1-x_2} = \frac{F_y(x_1,y_1,z_1)}{y_1-y_2} = \frac{F_z(x_1,y_1,z_1)}{z_1-z_2} = -\frac{2}{\lambda} x1​−x2​Fx​(x1​,y1​,z1​)​=y1​−y2​Fy​(x1​,y1​,z1​)​=z1​−z2​Fz​(x1​,y1​,z1​)​=−λ2​

于是n1\mathbf{n}_1n1​与AB→\overrightarrow{AB}AB平行,即切平面与ABABAB连线垂直.
